subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enthralled by the beauty of Truth! The manifestations and traces thereof are of two kinds and two modes: one under the laws of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حیران جمال حقیقت شئون و آثار بر دو نوع و دو طور یکی در تحت احکام عالم
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @The Holy Spirit, @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit
